name: Leather Armor
description: Tanned leather. Shifts movement 1 column left.

name: Chain / Scale Armor
description: Interlocking metal rings or overlapping scales. Shifts movement 2 columns left.

name: Heavy Scale / Half Plate
description: Heavy protection with significant movement penalty. Shifts movement 3 columns left.

name: Full Steel Armor
description: Complete steel plate coverage. Shifts movement 4 columns left.

name: Blue Steel Full Plate
description: Legendary blue-forged steel. Maximum protection. Shifts movement 5 columns left.
